After a month of intense consultation & data analysis, we are happy tо share your allocation. A lot of care was put into this, and we hope you like your $JUР pie. Excited to enter the new phase with you!

$JUР for JUР

Labels

Not a bot

Quick explainer on criteria and terms:

  • Welcome gift: 200 $JUР for all regardless of tier
  • OG Bonus: 500 $JUР for >$10 volume on JUРV1 or 10 transactions on MerV1. The JUРV1 contract is JUР6i4ozu5ydDCnLiMogSckDPpbtr7BJ4FtzYWkb5Rk and MerV1 is MERLuDFBMmsHnsBPZw2sDQZHvXFMwp8EdjudcU2HKky. For MerV1, the cutoff is March'22.
  • Score: Same-mint and stable-stable arbs with profit are not attributed towards multipliers and scores. Bots are attributed 50% of their volume.
  • Tier: Wallets are sorted by final score and split into 5 tiers. The top 2,000 are tier 1, next 10,000 are tier 2, next 50,000 are tier 3, next 168,000 are tier 4 (cumulative top 230,000), and the rest are tier 5.
  • Consistency: 1.2X your overall volume for non-bots who transacted at least 6 distinct months.
  • 2023 Multiplier: 2X your 2023 volume for non-bots who transacted at least once before 2023.
  • DCA & Limit Order: 5X your DCA & Limit Order volume
  • Bots: Defined as >=25% transaction failure rates on Solana, as found on Dune. This affects the more aggressive ones, such as arbers. Your rate will show up on the dashboard if it is >=25%.
  • Likely cluster: Detected via source of funds or transaction behaviour such as circular transactions. If we made a mistake, please reach out via the review form.

To understand how we arrived at these criteria, read these Tweets: The Beginning, The Wrap Up, The Intern Report
